title: Easy Craft Saddles
description: An easy way to craft Saddles
body:
With this mod you can finally craft the Saddles

Are you tired of looking for saddles in dungeons? Now you can create them simply using a piece of leather and two strings

**The mod is compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)**  
***RECIPE***  
![Recipe os saddle](https://i.imgur.com/EXg1NM6.png)
